title: haastia montana
intro: Haastia montana, also known as the mountain haastia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteliaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Haastia montana can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or it can be used to make a poultice or salve to apply directly to affected areas.
